text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whew! And that's the pigeon pose done! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right! I did it just like the article said, so I
should have a "lovely body to make one's fated
other swoon" in no ti—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, what is this article?! "Exercises for a
Beautiful Figure to Make Any Older Person Fall
to Their Knees"?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this one's "Yoga to Make Your Legs Turn
Heads"... Ooh, and this one is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I got it! If I do all these, Trainer will only have
eyes for me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm home! Hey, Mayano, listen to what Prez to—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano?! What happened? Why are you on the
floor covered in sweat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun wore herself out trying to get a
"hot bod."
